examples.title: Clock Replacement Algorithm
examples.description: Implements approximate LRU using circular buffer
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ClockReplacement
BEGIN
  WHILE needed:
    IF current_frame.ref_bit == 0:
      REPLACE current_frame
    ELSE:
      current_frame.ref_bit = 0
    ADVANCE clock hand
END
examples.explanation: Cycles through frames, replacing first unreferenced page while clearing reference bits
